task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Lean Bulk Plan' in the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lean Bulk Plan' details page or dashboard is visible in the wger web interface.

task_completion.description: Open the form to edit or set nutritional goals for the plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or editable section for nutritional goals (Energy, Protein, Carbohydrates, etc.) is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified values for Energy and Protein.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '3200' is entered in the Energy field and '180' is entered in the Protein field.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified values for Carbohydrates, Fat, and Fiber.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values '400' for Carbohydrates, '90' for Fat, and '35' for Fiber are entered into their respective fields.
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Submit', or checkmark button to persist the entered nutritional goals.

task_completion.description: Verify that the nutritional goals are saved and displayed on the plan page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lean Bulk Plan' page displays the updated nutritional goals: Energy (3200 kcal), Protein (180 g), Carbohydrates (400 g), Fat (90 g), and Fiber (35 g).

integrity.description: The agent used the wger web interface to set the goals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and wger UI, not terminal commands, python scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local wger URL and the UI matches the wger fitness manager.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No 'Inspect Element' or developer tools are open to modify the page HTML to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target plan: 'Lean Bulk Plan'. Expected goals: Energy = 3200 kcal, Protein = 180 g, Carbohydrates = 400 g, Fat = 90 g, Fiber = 35 g. Acceptable tolerances for verification: Energy ±5, Protein ±2, Carbohydrates ±5, Fat ±2, Fiber ±2.
